Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Greenwardens]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — The Greenwardens were founded to counteract weaponized alchemy and the worship of Othaghor (or Ach'magut).}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — The Greenwardens authored a manifesto regarding Kameira and Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — The Greenwardens are a group that employs Masons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — The Greenwardens sabotage Kameira hunting parties.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — The Greenwardens crest is the Emerald.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — The Greenwardens closed their chapter house.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Greenwardens are part of the Independent alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Greenwardens are described as too weak and too quiet.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — The Greenwardens call certain rain-catching plants 'jungle teacups'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — The Greenwardens constructed a miniature forest in weeks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — The Greenwardens are a group Calder mentions.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Greenwardens are one of the four Independent Guilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — The Greenwardens are an Independent Guild whose members are wrapped in living green-leafed vines.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Greenwardens are largely harmless without their trained Kameira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — The Greenwardens have Kameira expertise.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — The Greenwardens are for peace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Greenwardens are led by Tomas Stillwell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Greenwardens are a group clustering behind a barrier.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Ayana was tending to a dying Greenwarden.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
